basic_details.job_title: DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Gender Specialist and Specialist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Hub for Empowerment of Women Sivaganga (DHEW Sivaganga)
basic_details.post_name: Gender Specialist and Specialist In Financial Literacy
basic_details.short_information: District Hub for Empowerment of Women Sivaganga (DHEW Sivaganga) has released the official Gender Specialist and Specialist in Financial Literacy Notification 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of Graduate in Social Work / Other Social Disciplines or Graduate in Economics / Banking / Other Similar Disciplines can apply offline up to 18 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate In Social Work / Other Social Disciplines, Graduate In Economics / Banking Other Similar Disciplines
qualification.details: Gender Specialist: Graduate In Social Work / Other Social Disciplines. Post-Graduates Will Be Preferred. At Least 3 Years Experience Of Working With The Government / Non Government Organization In Gender Focused Themes. Specialist In Financial Literacy: Graduate In Economics / Banking Other Similar Disciplines. Post Graduates Will Be Preferred. At Least 3 Years Experience Of Working With The Government / Non Government Organization In Financial Literacy / Financial Inclusion Focused Themes.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHEW Sivaganga Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DHEW Sivaganga Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Gender Specialist and Specialist In Financial Literacy posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Gender Specialist and Specialist In Financial Literacy posts under the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Gender Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Gender Specialist post, candidates must be Graduates in Social Work or other Social Disciplines. Post-graduates will be preferred. A minimum of 3 years of experience in gender-focused themes is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Specialist In Financial Literacy post?
faq.answer: For the Specialist In Financial Literacy post, candidates must be Graduates in Economics, Banking, or other similar disciplines. Post-graduates will be preferred. At least 3 years of experience in financial literacy or financial inclusion themes is also required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026 is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both the Gender Specialist and Specialist In Financial Literacy posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Gender Specialist and Specialist In Financial Literacy are contractual in nature, as per the DHEW Sivaganga Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Hub for Empowerment of Women Sivaganga. Direct links are usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job notification articles.
